description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine accc_trip_cor_2, and is implemented by a call to accc_trip_cor_2. Use this API to apply the AC contingency calculation with tripping simulations and corrective actions. When there are violations in the post-tripping simulation solutions, the corrections actions analysis is launched to eliminate the violations, with the objective of minimizing the controls adjustments, including load shedding, MW generation dispatch and phase shifter angle adjustments. Rating set program option setting and 100.0 percent of rating set are used to check branch and interface flow overload violations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr = accc_trip_cor(tol, optacc, opttrp, optcor, values, labels, dfxfile, accfile, thrfile, inlfile, trpfile)
python_syntax: ierr = accc_trip_cor(tol, optacc, opttrp, optcor, values, labels, dfxfile, accfile, thrfile, inlfile, trpfile)

parameters.name: tol
parameters.description: Mismatch tolerance. (input; Newton solution convergence tolerance, TOLN, by default).

parameters.name: optacc
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying solution options. (input).

parameters.name: opttrp
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying tripping simulation options. (input).

parameters.name: optcor
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying corrective actions options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying corrective actions parameters. (input).

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying subsystem labels. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of the distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of the contingency solution output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: thrfile
parameters.description: Name of the load throwover data file. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: inlfile
parameters.description: Name of the unit inertia and governor data file. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: trpfile
parameters.description: Name of the tripping element data file. (input; blank for none; no default allowed if OPTTRP(1) is 1).

optacc.description: tap adjustment flag (tap adjustment option setting by default).
area interchange adjustment flag (area interchange adjustment option setting by default).
enable using tie line flows only in calculating area interchange.
enable using tie line flows and loads in calculating area interchange.
phase shift adjustment flag (phase shift adjustment option setting by default).
dc tap adjustment flag (dc tap adjustment option setting by default).
switched shunt adjustment flag (switched shunt adjustment option setting by default).
enable continuous mode, disable discrete mode.
non-divergent solution flag (non-divergent solution option setting by default).

opttrp.description: number of tripping events per power flow (1 by default).
number of power flows per contingency (1 by default).

optcor.description: number of power flow solutions (from 0 to 10, 1, by default).
phase shifter control flag (1 by default).

values.description: bus voltage violation tolerance (0.1 by default).
branch flow overload tolerance (0.1 by default).
generator control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
load control weighting factor (1.0 by default).
phase shifter control weighting factor (1.0 by default).

labels.description: label of generation dispatch subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTACC(8) is not 0).
label of generator control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(3) is 1).
label of load control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(4) is 1).
label of phase shifter control subsystem (blank by default, no default allowed if OPTCOR(5) is 1).

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
generation dispatch subsystem is not defined.
too many islands in base case.
file DFXFILE is not in the form of a PSSE-25 or later DFAX file; run DFAX.
monitored elements exceed limit when adding multi-section line members.
error opening Tripping Element Data File.
error opening Unit Inertia and Governor Data File.
error opening Contingency Solution Output File.
error opening Distribution Factor Data File.
error opening Load Throwover Data File.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
